case_title: NCO PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT ASGNE OF SBC VS. IRMA DELGADO et al

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCO PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT ASGNE OF SBC SERVED MAR-26-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADO, IRMA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-03-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-03-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
